title: More Utilities
description: Provides some utilities you might need in your single-player game or on modded Minecraft server
body: # MoreUtilities Mod that adds more utilities to Minecraft: - `/cleardrop` - clear all dropped items in your world - `[Numpad+]` - default bind for /cleardrop command - `[Backslash]` - default bind for /time set day command - `[Numpad-]` - default bind for /weather clear command - `autoTimeSetDay` gamerule - if true, automaticaly sets time to 1000 (day) - `autoWeatherClear` gamerule - if true, automaticaly sets weather to sun (clear) *all binds you can change in in-game settings.
